zh.Babthorpe, Selby, North Yorkshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾塞爾比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas De Babthorpe於1310年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾塞爾比時，他的父親Adam De Babthorpe171歲，母親Margaret Newmarche169歲。他和Answith de la Haye至少有2個兒子。他去世在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Babthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Bonthorpe in Willoughby (Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas De Babthorpe was born in 1310, in Selby, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam De Babthorpe, was 171 and his mother, Margaret Newmarche, was 169. He had at least 2 sons with Answith de la Haye. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas De Babthorpe est né en 1310, à Selby, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam De Babthorpe, avait 171 ans et sa mère, Margaret Newmarche, avait 169 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Answith de la Haye. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas De Babthorpe(이)가 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 셀비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam De Babthorpe(은)는 171세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Newmarche(은)는 169세였다. 그는 Answith de la Haye(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas De Babthorpe родился в 1310 г. в местности селби, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam De Babthorpe было 171 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Newmarche, 169.
